utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear with corresponding sections. Check full specification: Each item requires coverage type with costs. Health: specifies provider, monthly/annual costs, and details including mental health and telemedicine; satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Property: includes home/contents insurance with monthly/annual costs and coverage details; satisfies requirement. Travel: includes travel insurance with monthly/annual costs and coverage details; satisfies requirement. Additional_services: includes services listed and their costs (monthly and annual €0); satisfies requirement for 'any enhancement services with costs'. Total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual totals and extra breakdown info; satisfies requirement for 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three providers/products: ConsultingPro Company Benefits for health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings, only InsurePlus Standard Coverage (home_content) and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel_insurance) are directly present. 'ConsultingPro Company Benefits' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped. Therefore, I map the two matching items to their exact ratings.
